AboutPage.title: Who Are We
AboutPage.prev: At Linki, we strive to simplify access to medical equipment and supplies. Our platform connects certified suppliers with healthcare facilities to provide a fast, secure, and transparent purchasing experience across the Gulf region.
AboutPage.head1: Our goal is to empower the healthcare sector through smart and reliable supply.
AboutPage.head2: Our goal is to empower the healthcare sector through smart and reliable supply.
AboutPage.head3: Linki Marketplace was launched with a clear vision to transform the process of sourcing medical equipment into a seamless and efficient digital experience.
AboutPage.head4: We connect trusted medical suppliers with hospitals, centers, and clinics to simplify purchasing and deliver smart solutions that enhance the quality of healthcare services across the region.
AboutPage.head6: Providing a reliable, technology-driven platform that simplifies the purchasing and supply of medical equipment while ensuring efficiency and transparency at every step.
AboutPage.head8: To be the leading digital marketplace for medical equipment in the Gulf, setting new standards in efficiency, reliability, and user experience.
AboutPage.head10: A wide range of medical equipment — from diagnostic devices to surgical tools — all sourced from certified and trusted suppliers.
AboutPage.head11: Maintenance and calibration services to ensure device accuracy and operational efficiency according to the highest standards.
AboutPage.head12: Flexible payment and shipping options, including multiple payment methods, easy installment plans, and fast delivery across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf.
AboutPage.head13: Trusted suppliers and secure transactions — every purchase is handled with full transparency and reliability.
AboutPage.head15: The Linki team brings together top professionals from the fields of technology and healthcare, working hand in hand to redefine the medical supply experience — making it smarter, faster, and more reliable.

footer.prev: Our company specializes in manufacturing high-quality laboratory devices and equipment, providing maintenance and calibration services to ensure device efficiency, in addition to specialized solutions in ophthalmology equipment to support the medical sector with the highest accuracy and reliability.
footer.email: Do you have any questions or suggestions?
footer.phone: Or contact us via the following numbers

services.title: Our Services
services.prev: We offer a comprehensive range of services to support your needs in the medical equipment market from providing reliable products and maintenance & calibration services to flexible shipping and payment solutions, ensuring your company a smooth experience and successful partnership.
services.service1prev: We provide comprehensive solutions for the maintenance and inspection of ophthalmic devices, ensuring accurate measurements and reliable results.
services.service2prev: We provide comprehensive maintenance and calibration services for medical devices to ensure their accuracy and operational efficiency, with the highest global standards of safety and quality.
services.service3prev: We offer specialized maintenance and calibration services for laboratory devices to ensure the accuracy of lab analyses and the quality of results.
